title: toddalia unifoliolata
intro: Toddalia unifoliolata, also known as the Chinese dodonaea or Asian dodonaea, is a plant species native to China and India, belonging to the family Rutaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Toddalia unifoliolata are attributed to its ability to lower blood pressure, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory infections. The plant can be prepared as an herbal tea, tincture, or ointment, and is often used in traditional Chinese medicine to treat various ailments.
